Prep AI is a comprehensive, all-in-one AI platform designed to help job seekers and professionals master interview skills and deepen their subject knowledge by leveraging conversational and generative AI technologies.
My LLM learning journey—implementing concepts, reproducing research, and experimenting with techniques from frontier AI labs.

Devecho is an AI-powered social media assistant designed to generate engaging LinkedIn posts based on user-provided content. It automates data collection, retrieval, and post-generation using AI-driven techniques and multiple autonomous AI agents that collaborate to optimize the content. This combination of intelligent agents and advanced retrieval

GUARDIAN EYE.AI provides an innovative solution for public safety in urban India, utilizing AI and computer vision to detect violence in real-time. This advanced technology enhances traditional surveillance systems, enabling proactive responses to threats and fostering safer communities amidst rapid urbanization and evolving security challenges.

This project shows how to run Ollama on a weak computer using Kaggle for free GPU hosting, Ngrok for secure tunneling, and Open Web UI for interaction. It’s a cost-effective, accessible solution for developers and researchers to manage AI models privately without relying on expensive hardware.
